character_feature.name: Darkvision
character_feature.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light.

character_feature.name: Fey Ancestry
character_feature.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed.

background.name: Acolyte
background.description: You have spent your life in service to a temple.

background.name: Criminal
background.description: You have a history of breaking the law.

species.name: Human
species.description: Humans are the most adaptable and ambitious people.

species.name: Elf
species.description: Elves are a magical people of otherworldly grace.
